title: Figure 1 from: Arredondo BS, Carreño-Guevara Y, Gutierrez-Villanueva Y, Duran-Bautista EH, Gamboa-Tabares J, Guerrero RJ (2025) Soil and leaf litter ants from the Amazon Region offer new distribution records for Colombia. Biodiversity Data Journal 13: e142813. https://doi.org/10.3897/BDJ.13.e142813
author: Arredondo, Brandon S.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1 Methodology TSBF. A Introduction of the monolite into the soil by mechanical action; B Leaf litter removal for extraction with Winkler bags; C Organisation of the area for monolite extraction; D Extraction of the monolite; E Cleaning and organisation of the monolite F Stratification of the monolite where the deepest stratum (20-30 cm) was removed; G Manual revision of the superficial stratum (= A); H Manual revision of the stratum B.
steps_raw: Figure 1 Methodology TSBF.
